summary: High‑energy 80’s show with Stephen Stills, standout China Cat > Rider and Black Queen, captured in a generally excellent recording that has a tiny gap between drums and Black Queen.
review: The concert is remembered for its lively vibe – a superb China Cat > Rider segue into a raw, crunchy Black Queen (with Iko following) and a special Stephen Stills guest spot. Reviewers rave about the sound quality, calling it “so good,” though one notes a brief missing segment at the drum‑to‑Black Queen transition. Overall the performance and recording are praised.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviewers gave 4–5 stars, highlighting strong musical moments and a very good‑to‑excellent sound despite a minor recording glitch.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listeners describe the audio as exceptionally clear and enjoyable; one reviewer mentions a tiny missing piece during the drum‑to‑Black Queen transition.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set flows well with strong transitions, especially China Cat > Rider into Black Queen; only a brief gap is noted between the drum segment and Black Queen.

band_member_comments.Drums: The drum segment (drumz) is highlighted, though a recording hiccup occurs right after it.
